graded_findings.rationale: The gather evidence says this new specification documents the command behavior, config argument, validation rules, and return-code contract. That is not an adherence gap.
The gather evidence says this new implementation plan maps the command, helper, registration, and tests to the specification. That is not a merge-blocking documentation issue.
The command reference still omits the new validate_config command and its -c/--config option. That leaves user-facing deployment documentation inconsistent with the changed CLI behavior.
